subcodes.first_line: It hath been ordained that every matter shall have its appointed time. When its destined hour cometh, it shall appear with truth, and none can avert it. Thus hath it been decreed in the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قدر لکل امر میقات اذا جاء اجله یاتی بالحق و لامرد له کذلک قدر فی لوح
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @mystical themes, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
